headline: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (CDNS) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Cadence (CDNS) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

headline: Wall Street Yawns at the Hormuz Blockade Then Buys Software
summary: The United States effectively blockaded the Strait of Hormuz. Oil touched $105 a barrel intraday. The S&P 500 closed 1% higher. If that sequence of events doesn't tell you something about where investor psychology sits right now, I'm not sure what will.

headline: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of electronic design automation company Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) jumped 5% in the morning session after investors moved to buy the dip in SaaS names that had become significantly oversold amid a fragile market rebound driven by cautious optimism surrounding U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks.
